description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house surrounded by a fenced yard with manicured grass and several mature trees. The front facade features a prominent double-height entryway with arched windows, a two-car garage, and a paved driveway leading to a gate. The backyard includes a curvilinear swimming pool with a poolside umbrella and patio area, as well as a hot tub. The house exterior is finished in light-colored brick or stone, with symmetrical window arrangements and a complex, multi-gabled roof. The property is enclosed by a low, light-colored fence, providing both privacy and a clear boundary.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with arched windows, a double garage, a fenced yard, and a backyard pool with patio and hot tub.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial rear of the house, highlighting the backyard pool, hot tub, and several trees along the fence.
description_view_1: This view displays the side of the house with three large arched windows and a row of trees along the fence, with no visible entryway.
description_view_2: This view focuses on the opposite side and rear, showing the pool, patio umbrella, and a single arched window, with more of the backyard visible.
description_view_3: This is the front view, featuring the main entryway with double-height arched windows, the garage, driveway, and the front gate.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-height entry with arched windows, central door, small porch, and decorative columns
